report.summary: Audited 4 new pages (Aave v4 guide, Uniswap v4 hooks guide, ecosystem/aave, ecosystem/uniswap) for UX issues, created OG images for both learn guides, and implemented accessibility/mobile refinements across interactive components.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed UniswapV4HooksExplorer mobile layout: added responsive CSS so 2-column grid stacks to 1-column on screens < 640px
Added keyboard focus rings (boxShadow 2px #6366f1) to all phase filter buttons in UniswapV4HooksExplorer
Added focus ring + aria-label to hook list buttons in UniswapV4HooksExplorer for screen reader support
Added aria-pressed attribute to phase filter buttons for accessibility state feedback
Added role='tablist' and role='tab' with aria-selected/aria-label to AaveV4SpokesExplorer spoke tabs
Added keyboard focus rings (boxShadow with spoke color) to spoke tab buttons in AaveV4SpokesExplorer
Added hover underline effect to Table of Contents links in Aave v4 guide for better link affordance
Fixed combineSchemas() call in aave-v4-guide — was passing two args instead of array, now matches Uniswap page pattern

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: aave-v4-guide (1200x630) — SVG + PNG with ghost emoji, Hub & Spoke mini diagram, TVL/GHO/launch stat cards, degen0x brand gradient
OG image: uniswap-v4-hooks (1200x630) — SVG + PNG with unicorn emoji, Hook lifecycle diagram (beforeSwap/afterSwap), use case badges, volume/hooks/gas stat cards

sections.title: Files Modified
items: src/app/learn/aave-v4-guide/page.tsx — ToC hover underlines, combineSchemas fix
src/components/AaveV4SpokesExplorer.tsx — tablist role, tab role, aria-selected, aria-label, focus ring styles
src/components/UniswapV4HooksExplorer.tsx — responsive grid CSS, focus rings on filter + list buttons, aria-pressed, aria-label
public/og-aave-v4-guide.png — new OG image (PNG for social sharing)
public/og-uniswap-v4-hooks.png — new OG image (PNG for social sharing)
